reviews.review_description: I grabbed this demo as a fan of rythem games. The concept on this is fun. It made me laugh when it was working. The game shows a few different spots to go to but I am unable to access the chef and engineer levels. I assume that's because of the demo but it doesn't say that so I'm not sure what I'm sposed to have access to and what I'm not. The latency is off because sometimes I'm not registering hits that I'm certain are on time. There is no latency calibration I the options which I can't get to change to English. I'm not certain if the full version of this game is any better and I don't see an option to put hade it anyway. But I have to say the couple levels that worked and I was able to play were fun so this might be a fun game I enjoy. I'm frustrated enough to let it sit for a while and see if it gets an update but intrigued enough not to give up on it yet. 2 stars for now, will update accordingly.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback and it defenly helps us a lot for the improvement. 
1. The demo only contains 3 levels of the game for players to try and play. It is our fault to add more clear instruction inside the demo version.
2. As for the latency calibration, we are still working on it in the official version in the future.
Thank you for your time and interested in our game. You can share our game to other rhythm game players and community. It could really give us a great help.
